stories.title: From win total to rotation ERA to Ohtani's WAR: Predicting the Dodgers' season from their first-month pace
stories.summary: 110 wins? How much WAR for Shohei Ohtani? We use L.A.'s hot start to play over/under for the rest of 2026.

stories.title: Sources: NCAA eyes star QB Sorsby for gambling
stories.summary: Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby is checking into a residential treatment program for a gambling addiction, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: GM: Bills shut down trade interest in Coleman
stories.summary: The Bills "shut down" a couple of teams that reached out with trade interest in Keon Coleman earlier this offseason, general manager Brandon Beane said Monday on local radio station WGR-550.

stories.title: Rockets stay alive, find belief in Sengun's speech
stories.summary: The Rockets staved off playoff elimination with a 115-96 win over the Lakers in Game 4 on Sunday night and credited Alperen Sengun's speech from morning shootaround for helping them believe they could come back in the series.

stories.title: Wemby back, unhappy with concussion process
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama had 27 points, 12 rebounds and seven blocks in his return from a concussion as the Spurs beat the Blazers for a 3-1 series lead.
